items.title: Trump says 20-year nuclear programme suspension by Iran would be enough
items.dek: The US president says Tehran has to show "real" commitment to removing nuclear fuel and stopping uranium enrichment.
items.body: The US president says Tehran has to show "real" commitment to removing nuclear fuel and stopping uranium enrichment.

items.title: What China critics in Maga movement make of Trump's Beijing trip
items.dek: Trump’s softer approach towards China is one that experts say will likely trickle down to the wider MAGA base.
